description:
Permanent role |Based in North Rocks (North Parramatta), Sydney
Strong experience with Magento / Adobe Commerce
Experience with Punchout and/or EDI| Australia Citizen/PR

We are seeking a hands‑on Technical Business Analyst with strong experience with Magento / Adobe Commerce.

You will have strong delivery ownership to support and enhance the B2B e‑commerce platforms. This role blends technical analysis, integrations, troubleshooting, and end‑to‑end delivery management across a distributed team. Ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex problems and driving work from idea → build → test → release.

This is not a purely a strategic or hands-off role. You will be in the detail; reading Jira tickets, reviewing developer estimates, running UAT, and writing requirements that are acted on within the same sprint.

About the Role

A hybrid Tech BA + Delivery Lead role where you'll manage BAU issues, own the backlog, coordinate offshore development, and run releases end‑to‑end. You'll work closely with the Ecommerce Manager while leading the day‑to‑day delivery workflow.

Key Responsibilities:

Manage BAU tickets (accounts, content, payments, configuration)
Troubleshoot technical issues across APIs, integrations, and data flows
Prioritise daily issues and coordinate fixes with development/test teams
Gather requirements and maintain a clear, prioritised backlog
Scope, estimate, and assign work to offshore developers
Run sprints and manage delivery independently
Coordinate testing, deployment, and stakeholder communication
Lead weekly/fortnightly small releases, plus 4-5 major releases annually
Train/coach the staff on use of E- commerce system

Key Skills Required:

Strong B2B e‑commerce background
Experience with Magento / Adobe Commerce (admin, workflows, catalogue, integrations)
Understanding of payment gateways (e.g., Stripe) and reconciliation flows
Experience with Punchout and/or EDI
Solid grasp of APIs, integrations, and data flows
Ability to troubleshoot production issues across multiple systems
Experience running sprints and managing delivery end‑to‑end
ERP‑integrated e‑commerce experience
Exposure to offshore development teams
Ability to read payloads, test APIs, and validate data

Please Note: All resumes MUST be submitted in Word format.

If you are interested in hearing more about this position, don't hesitate to get in touch.
